name: Ranger
Description: Say hi to Ranger, a handsome, sleek black male cat with a small patch of white on his chest. He was originally found as a stray out by himself. There were some nasty storms coming, so his finder called to see if we could take him in before they hit. He was able to thrive in a foster home and was soon adopted with a kitten from another litter, Bruin. They were together for 10 years and were returned to Misty Eyes because their owners have moved to another country. Bruin was adopted, but Ranger, unfortunately, experienced some health issues. He is a friendly and affectionate cat, who will be a wonderful companion. If you would like to provide Ranger a comfortable quiet home, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Finneas
Description: Finneas has such an adorable little meow for such a big fluffy cat, and he uses that cute meow for attention and pets! He does well with other cats, but when he's done, he finds a hidden spot on a cat tower or elsewhere to take a nap. He likes to follow our volunteers around the cat room for pets; or maybe he's just supervising us! If you would like to meet Finneas, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Arabella
Description: Arabella is a sweet little orphan girl who was found as a stray and brought to Misty Eyes. She was adopted, but, sadly, her owner passed away She was adopted again, then surrendered to a county shelter due to no fault of hers. She's a friendly, affectionate, playful girl who loves pets, quiet talks, and a good cat squeeze up! If you'd like to learn more about Arabella, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Juju
Description: Juju was surrendered to Misty Eyes after her owner passed away, and the family would not care for her. She is not a lap cat, but is nighttime snuggler. She does take some time to get used to new people and surroundings. She will pick a safe place where she can go when she feels insecure. She would prefer to be the only cat in the home and, with patience, is a sweet, loving companion. She has great litterbox habits, uses her scratching post rather than the furniture and enjoys a cat tree near a window. Juju does take daily thyroid medication, which is relatively inexpensive. If you'd like to know more about Juju, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Hope II
Description: Hope couldn't decide whether to be a calico cat or a tiger kitty! She was surrendered to Misty Eyes due to her owner's allergies. She is a friendly, playful girl who will make a great companion. She has good litterbox manners, is playful and enjoys a cat tree with a scratching post. She is living with other cats in her foster home, but would be happiest as the ONLY KITTY! She doesn't \“show\“ well initially because she gets very stressed in new places. After about 24 hours, though, she is friendly and affectionate -- on her terms. She is not a lap kitty and doesn't enjoy being held, but she may lay beside her person and enjoy a chin scratch or two. If you'd like to know more about Hope, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Marge
Description: Meet Marge, a black-and-white beauty who has been waiting patiently at Misty Eyes for her forever home for over 2 1/2 years! This charming gal, with her adorable little white mustache, is a sturdy companion who knows how to keep life simple. At 3 1/2 years old, Marge is a low-maintenance kitty who won't claw her way through your furniture or make a ruckus-she's more of a \“purr-fectly calm\“ kind of cat. While she may not be a fan of being picked up, she absolutely adores being near you, soaking up all the love and gentle pets you can offer. Marge thrives in a serene environment, so if you have a quiet home without the hustle and bustle of small children, active cats, or dogs, she could be your steady sidekick. Remember, good things come to those who wait, and with a little patience, Marge will blossom into the loving companion you've always wanted. Don't let this opportunity slip through your fingers-submit an adoption application for Marge today at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication and help give her the forever home she deserves!

name: Taffy
Description: Taffy is a pretty Tortie kitty who came to us with her 4 kittens. Now that Taffy has weaned her kittens, she is ready for her forever home where she can spend her days lounging and enjoying the good life. Taffy takes time to warm up initially, but once comfortable, likes to be in the room you are in, but not necessarily sitting on you. If you would like a cat companion who just wants to share your space, but not your lap, please submit a non-binding adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Linus
Description: Meet Linus! This handsome male tiger cat came to Misty Eyes as an unclaimed stray. He's living in a foster home where he has learned good litterbox habits and how to be a friendly, social house kitty. Sadly, Linus does have a somewhat rare heart condition. He is not currently on medication, but cats with his diagnosis generally have a shortened life span. He will need to be monitored for signs of worsening of the condition, such as reduced respiration, and may require periodic vet visits. If you are able to provide Linus with a safe, loving home, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Spicey
Description: Poor Spicey...she was a shy kitten, but because of her fluffy appearance, was adopted fairly quickly. She was returned because she behaved like a cat (scratching furniture) and was banished to another room by herself. That, of course, has exacerbated her shyness. She is, however, a sweet kitty with good litterbox manners. If you'd like to meet Spicey, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Kenny
Description: Kenny was found as a stray and was never claimed by an owner. He is strikingly handsome! He is loving with people, but not appreciative of the other male kitties in his foster home. He is a bigger boy at 11 lbs. Kenny loves getting affection from his people and is a cuddler. He has good litterbox manners, but can be a little boisterous at times with the litter. If you are seeking a cat to be your companion and lap buddy, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Mabel
Description: Meet Mabel! This kitty is so sweet but right now is very scared. Sadly she had a loving owner but she got dementia and Mabel became homeless. She lived with another cat but they are not bonded. She is used to a quieter home. This precious girl needs a sweet family to take her in and show her the world is ok since hers was turned upside down.

name: Carol
Description: \“Queen\“ Carol loves to hang out on her throne (aka \“the grey donut\“), keeping an eye on everyone in Kitty City; which makes sense because she came to Misty Eyes very pregnant, gave birth, and co-parented her kittens with another cat mom. She enjoys watching birds on cat tv, and gets along with other cats. Carol is very playful and smart - she loves interactive toys! Once she is done playing, she asks for pets, then will find a sunny spot to nap. If you would like to meet Carol, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Violet
Description: Sweet Violet is as pretty as a flower! She loves to sunbathe and watch birds out on the catio when the weather is warm. She is a loving girl who enjoys pets. She gets along with other cats, but when she's had enough, she'll find a quiet place up high to watch everything around her, or take a snooze. She will make a great companion for someone who wants company but not clingy. If you'd like to meet Violet, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Nugget
Description: Nugget is a very handsome tiger-and-white male neutered cat who came from a hoarder home. He didn't receive the care and attention he needed to socialize him, so he has taken some time to learn that people are good and living in a real home is the best. Nugget is a very sweet boy! He will head butt and rub against people asking them to please pet him. He also rubs up against other cats, and even rubs against his foster brother rabbit \“Jack\“ to get some snuggles from him too! If you'd like to meet Nugget, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Polly
Description: Playful Polly is a lovely female spayed brown tiger cat, about 6 years old and 12 lb. Sadly, her owners encountered some hard times, so she was surrendered to the local shelter. Now that she's with Misty Eyes, Polly hopes to find a new home and family. She loves chin scratches and human attention, but also likes to chill at the window and watch birds! She's reported to be good with children and gets along with other cats, as well as some dogs. If you'd like to meet Polly, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Noir
Description: Meet Noir! She is a very sweet kitten who was found as a stray and taken to the local shelter. Because she seemed to have an injury to her abdomen and needed medical care, Misty Eyes brought her into our foster program. Once she's been treated and recovers, this lovely kitten will make a great companion. She loves to sit in the window and talk to the birds or lay in a sunbeam during the day, and warm her foster's lap in the evening! If you'd like to meet Noir, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Ginger
Description: Meet Ginger! This beautiful, easy-going 10-year-old orange tabby is ready to trade shelter life for a cozy forever home. Like many senior kitties, the shelter environment was stressful for her, so she came to Misty Eyes in search of the quiet, loving home she deserves. Ginger is a true \“people cat.\“ She adores gentle head pets, long naps, and simply being near her favorite human. With her front declawing in the past, she's happiest in a calm environment where she can relax and feel secure. She would prefer to be your one and only feline-after all, a queen like Ginger deserves to be the center of attention! She is currently on an inexpensive thyroid medication, which helps keep her feeling her best, making her a wonderful, low-maintenance companion. If you're looking for a sweet, laid-back friend with just the right touch of diva charm, Ginger may be the perfect match for you. To meet Ginger, please submit an adoption application at: https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Navi
Description: Novi is a pretty black young female kitty who has come to Misty Eyes in hope of finding a forever home. She has a nice, friendly personality without being overly affectionate. Unfortunately, Novi is FeLV positive. That means that she cannot live with other cats unless they, too, are FeLV positive. FeLV cats can live a relatively normal life, but should be kept indoors due to their somewhat impaired immune system. If you have room in your home and your heart for a companion like Novi, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Chobani
Description: Chobani is a sweet, curious kitty who enjoys watching birds and squirrels on the catio in good weather, or sleeping next to a warm computer in not so good weather. She is a tiny girl full of energy (can you say \“zoomies\“?!) but can sometimes feel overwhelmed in the hustle and bustle of a busy day and will go find her favorite cat tree for a wind down. She is food motivated, loving all types of kitty treats, and often enjoys a private dining session in the Kitty City kitchen. If you would like to know more about Chobani, please submit a non-binding adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Solterra
Description: Solterra is a sweet shy girl who is cautiously curious. She loves treats, playing with motion cat toys, treats, cuddling up with another cat for a nap, and treats. While she doesn't always love pets, she will accept them if the right treat is offered! Solterra loves to play like a kitten, gets along great with other cats, and when she's done, she'll find a cozy perch on the catio for a break. She will likely take some time to feel comfortable in a new home, but once she feels safe and loved, we're sure she'll settle in and make the best kitty companion. If you think you can give Solterra the love and time she needs to feel at home, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Teddy
Description: Teddy is a very sweet, gentle boy with an easygoing personality and a soft, sensitive heart. While he isn't the most active cat, he does enjoy a bit of playtime-especially with wand toys that have a little worm on the end or a toy mouse he can quietly bat around. Most of the time, though, Teddy prefers a calm environment where he can relax and feel safe. Teddy can be shy and will need a patient, understanding home. When he first arrived, he was very scared and spent quite a bit of time hiding, slowly venturing out only when he felt secure. Even now, he may be cautious around new people and can still get a little spooked with sudden movement, but he continues to make steady progress and grows more confident each day. Once Teddy trusts you, his affectionate side really shines. He doesn't love being picked up, but he will come to you for pets and attention on his own terms, which makes those moments extra special. He also enjoys being near his person-like sneaking into bed after you get up in the morning or relaxing nearby while you go about your day. Teddy loves cozy perches, especially near windows. You'll often find him lounging on the back of the sofa soaking up the view, napping on a chair by the window, or perched up high watching the world below. These peaceful spots are his happy place. Teddy would do best in a quiet home with someone patient who will give him the time and space he needs to fully come out of his shell. In return, you'll gain a gentle, loving companion who just needs a little understanding to truly shine. If you would like to meet Teddy, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Gabe
Description: Wanted: to meet my furever family. Are you looking to open your home to a new pet? Learn more about this pet and others near you looking to find their forever home.

name: Livie
Description: Meet Livie, a sweet, gentle girl who is looking for a calm place to call home. With a quiet environment and a caring person by her side, she will truly blossom. Livie enjoys the simple things in life - soft beds, peaceful surroundings, and most of all, cozy snuggle time. Livie would do best in a quieter home where she can relax, feel safe, and build a close bond with their person. Once comfortable, she loves curling up next to you, sharing warm cuddles and quiet companionship. If you're looking for a loving, low-key friend to keep you company and fill your home with gentle affection, this snuggly sweetheart could be the perfect match. If you would like to meet Livie, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Carini
Description: Carini is the perfect mix of sweet & sassy! In a foster home with other cats, she'll play (she loves any kind of ball toy!) and chase around with them, but once she is done, she makes everyone aware with a hiss; a cat sibling would need to be confident and enjoy play. Carini has been with dogs, and while she doesn't attempt play or cuddles, she doesn't mind if they are around. She loves napping by a sunny window, lounging on the couch, and getting pets (she loves attention, but doesn't love to be picked up though). If you think Carini would be a great forever friend for you, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Alexander
Description: Alexander is a brown tiger-and-white male kitty who is seeking his forever home. He is an easy-going boy with good litterbox habits and non-destructive house manners. He gets along with other cats and even dogs. He has been around a young child, but would probably do best in a quiet home where children don't expect him to play. He's not a lap cat, but does enjoy being petted. If you are seeking a quiet, friendly, and calm companion, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Impreza
Description: Impreza is a cat with a clear set of priorities-food comes first. She's the kind of girl who will show up the moment she hears a can open or a bag rustle, and she takes her meals very seriously. While she tolerates pets, Impreza is more independent by nature. She enjoys being near her people on her own terms rather than soaking up constant attention. Her favorite place to be is up high, where she can quietly observe everything going on below. Whether it's a tall cat tree, a shelf, or the top of a cabinet, she feels most comfortable when she has a good vantage point. She would do best in a home that appreciates her laid-back personality-one that understands that love doesn't always look like cuddles, but sometimes like simply sharing the same space... preferably from above. If you would like to meet Impreza, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Corolla
Description: Corolla is a handsome, playful guy who loves to run laps around Kitty City. His best petting time is while he's sleeping because otherwise he is on the go! He's a crunchy treat connoisseur, so if you offer him some, he may slow down long enough to get some head rubs too! He gets along well with the other cats in the playroom - he makes a friend with everyone! If you would like to meet Corolla, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Branch
Description: Branch is a handsome, young orange tabby with white patches who came to us from an overcrowded shelter. Although he tested positive for Feline Leukemia (FeLV), he's currently doing very well and continues to thrive with lots of love and care. Because of his FeLV status, Branch will need to be the only cat in the home, or join a family with another FeLV-positive kitty. What he may need in special placement, he more than makes up for in sweetness. He's a truly good boy with so much love to give - and he deserves a forever family to call his very own. If you're ready to open your heart and home to this special guy, please submit an adoption application at: https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Sugar Plum
Description: Wanted: to meet my furever family. Are you looking to open your home to a new pet? Learn more about this pet and others near you looking to find their forever home.

name: Lucy
Description: Lucy is a friendly and affectionate girl who enjoys being around people. She loves attention and happily accepts pets, often choosing to sit right beside you to keep you company. While she isn't much of a lap cat, she still likes being close and sharing quiet moments with her humans. Lucy has a gentle, tolerant personality and does especially well with children, making her a wonderful family companion. When it's mealtime, her favorite flavor is chicken-her top pick every time! If you would like to meet Lucy, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: CJ
Description: CJ is an easygoing, laid-back cat who takes life in stride. He gets along well with other cats and doesn't mind dogs, making him a great fit for a home with other pets. With his calm and relaxed personality, CJ is the kind of cat who is happy to simply hang out and be part of the household. He's not demanding or high-energy-just a chill companion who enjoys the comfort of a peaceful home and the company of his people and furry friends. If you're looking for a mellow, friendly cat who can blend right into a multi-pet home, CJ could be the perfect match. If you would like to meet CJ, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Quinn
Description: Wanted: to meet my furever family. Are you looking to open your home to a new pet? Learn more about this pet and others near you looking to find their forever home.

name: Harley
Description: Wanted: to meet my furever family. Are you looking to open your home to a new pet? Learn more about this pet and others near you looking to find their forever home.

name: Hamilton
Description: Have you ever laid eyes on such a dapper and dignified dog as Hamilton? This 4-year-old, 65-pound bundle of joy is not just a handsome face; he's a heart full of potential waiting for the right person to unlock it! Although he was adopted from Misty Eyes as a puppy, the whirlwind of life has left him a bit unrefined in the socialization and training department. But don't let that deter you! With a sprinkle of love and a dash of patience, Hamilton can learn the ropes and shine like the star he truly is. This sweet boy is a gentle giant who prefers to express himself through tail wags rather than barks, is already crate-trained, and peacefully coexists with resident cats and most large dogs. His favorite activities include soaking up the sun, indulging in belly rubs, and playing with his toys-talk about a laid-back lifestyle! A chaotic, busy environment does seem to stress Hamilton somewhat, so a quiet home with a fenced yard would be best for him. With so many pets in need of homes, there's no time like the present to open your heart and home to Hamilton. If you'd like to meet him, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Sammy
Description: Meet Sammy, a lovable Lab/Shepherd mix who's almost four years old and tipping the scales at a solid 80 pounds of pure joy! This friendly and energetic boy has had quite the journey, arriving at Misty Eyes from an overcrowded shelter alongside his siblings. Although he was adopted as a puppy, life threw a curveball, and he found himself back in the care of our dedicated team-through no fault of his own! Now, in his foster home, Sammy is wagging his tail with delight as he polishes up his house manners, proving that practice makes paw-fect! Sammy adores going on walks and spending quality time with his foster family, ready to bring boundless happiness to a forever home. Although he is fine with most people, Sammy doesn't appreciate other animals, so will need to be the only pet in the home. He would be a great fit for a country home with property where he can expend his energy. If you would like an active, loyal companion, please submit an adoption application for Sammy online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Willow
Description: Meet sweet Willow, a delightful Pittie Mix, who is about 4 years young and weighs in at 53 pounds! With her charming personality and infectious energy, she is sure to steal your heart! Rescued from an overcrowded shelter in southern Indiana in 2022, Willow embodies the spirit of second chances. She was adopted, briefly, and returned through no fault of hers. This active girl thrives on human companionship and is ready to be your new best friend! While she can be a bit selective with her furry friends and is leash-reactive, she would absolutely flourish as an only pet in a loving home with a fenced yard to play and romp around in. So, if you're looking to add a bundle of joy to your life, consider giving sweet Willow her forever home-because who wouldn't want a little more sweetness in their life? If you'd like to meet Willow, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Piper
Description: Meet Piper-a truly special little lady who's been waiting far too long to find her forever home. This sweet Miniature Pinscher mix has quite the story. She arrived at Misty Eyes Animal Center from a shelter with her litter of eight puppies, and after lovingly raising them, it's finally her turn to be cared for and cherished. Piper will be a bit timid at first and can be shy around new people, but with patience, kindness, and a little time, she blossoms into a devoted and affectionate companion. Once you've earned her trust, she'll happily curl up beside you and show just how loving she truly is. At around 3½ years old and 30 pounds, Piper has a playful side-she especially enjoys chasing her favorite ball and letting her joyful spirit shine. Because she can be sensitive to loud noises and unfamiliar situations, she would do best in a calm, quiet home where she can feel safe and secure. Piper finds comfort in her people and forms strong, loyal bonds. With the right family-one that understands her gentle nature and is willing to go at her pace-she will be an incredibly rewarding companion. If you're ready to open your heart and home to this deserving girl, please submit an adoption application at: https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Layla
Description: Layla is a very pretty Goldendoodle who came to Misty Eyes from a puppy mill, where she was a breeding machine. She is somewhat shy and anxious at first. Despite her fear and anxiety, Layla is good natured and friendly, once she relaxes. She gets along with other dogs well and enjoys back scratches and ear rubs. Layla will need continued training to overcome her fear of entering and exiting the car and to understand what life as a family dog is all about. She has made great strides on leash walking, trusting and following humans with practiced commands. She is crate/potty trained. She has experience being around various dogs, cats, and children. She thrives with a confident dog companion, following their cues to learn dog life. Because of her anxiety, Layla is a flight risk, so will need to be treated with extra caution until she feels comfortable in her new life. Due to her extreme anxiety and inclination to flee, Layla will need a securely fenced yard and an adopter who can commit to working with her to overcome her fear. She may never be an extremely social dog, but can be a great companion to her immediate family and familiar friends. If you have the patience and willingness to help Layla achieve her potential, please submit an adoption application online at https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication

name: Duke
Description: Say hello to Duke, an almost 12-year-old Chihuahua/Terrier mix who proves that age is just a number! This sweet little guy is a wonderful companion with plenty of pep left in his step-you'd never guess his age when you see him happily playing with his favorite squeaky toys. Duke came to Misty Eyes with his buddy Max after their owner faced a serious health condition. Despite the changes in his life, Duke has remained a cheerful, loving dog who enjoys the company of people and gets along well with other dogs. He's potty trained and ready to settle right into a home where he can be a loyal companion. Duke does have a heart condition that requires daily medication, so his adopter should be prepared for the ongoing care and expense. In return, you'll receive endless affection and the joy of giving a deserving senior dog a loving home. If you'd like to meet Duke, please submit an adoption application at: https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication

name: Copper
breed: Border Collie/Setter, Irish Red and White
Breed: Border Collie/Setter, Irish Red and White
Description: Meet handsome Copper, a striking 5-year-old pup with a big heart and an even bigger zest for life! After the sad loss of his owner, Copper was surrendered to a shelter. He's now safe in a Misty Eyes foster home while he waits for a loving forever family to call his own. Weighing 52 pounds, Copper is believed to be an Irish Setter / Border Collie mix - a combination that often brings together intelligence, athleticism, and enthusiasm. True to his heritage, Copper is friendly, outgoing, and full of energy. He gets along well with other dogs, especially those close to his size, and would thrive with an active family. He is somewhat anxious and becomes distressed with too much activity in the home. He would do best in a quiet home without a great many visitors and noise, but with owners able to provide the physical and mental stimulation he needs. If you're looking for a loyal walking buddy, hiking companion, or adventure partner, Copper may be the perfect match for you. If you're ready to give this wonderful boy the fresh start he deserves, please submit an adoption application online at: https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication.

name: Gimli
Description: Meet Gimli, a strikingly handsome 4-year-old German Shepherd weighing about 65 pounds. Like many GSDs, Gimli forms deep bonds with his person, and he's finding it a bit challenging to adjust after being surrendered through no fault of his own. Now in a loving Misty Eyes foster home, he's beginning his journey toward finding the one special person or family he can call his own. Gimli is a sensitive, somewhat anxious boy with mild separation anxiety, but with patience, consistency, and companionship, his confidence will continue to grow. Once he feels secure, he will reward his person with unwavering loyalty and devotion-everything this incredible breed is known for. He is crate-trained, has good house manners, and is not destructive in the home (though he may occasionally test the counters for snacks!). Gimli does well with older children and gets along with other dogs, and having both human and canine companions will help him feel more comfortable as he settles in. Gimli would thrive in a home familiar with the German Shepherd breed-one that can provide structure, mental stimulation, and ideally ongoing training to help him reach his full potential. With the right environment and a little time, Gimli is sure to blossom into an extraordinary companion. If you'd like to meet this loyal and loving boy, please submit an adoption application at: https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptablepets

name: Bono
Description: Meet Bono, a short, stocky little Min Pin/Chihuahua mix with a big heart! At 5½ years old and around 16 pounds, he's the perfect size for a cozy lap companion. After he and his housemates sadly lost their owner, Bono was surrendered to a shelter, where it was discovered he needed medical care. He had a large bladder stone that required surgery to remove. Because of this, he may need to remain on a prescription diet for life to keep him healthy. Bono is a friendly, affectionate, and happy little guy who truly enjoys being with his people. He has good potty habits once he settles into a routine, though he may occasionally mark as he adjusts to a new home, especially since he was only recently neutered. He's a laid-back companion overall, not overly active but still playful-he loves the occasional burst of zoomies and has a soft spot for stuffie toys. More than anything, Bono just wants to be near his person, soaking up attention and companionship. If you're looking for a sweet, loyal little buddy to share your days with, Bono could be the perfect match. If you'd like to meet him, please submit an adoption application at: https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication

name: Izzy
Description: Meet Izzy - and yes, he really is as cute as he sounds! This handsome guy was found as a neighborhood stray, and now he's getting a fresh start with Misty Eyes, learning all about life as a beloved companion in his foster home. Izzy is about 1 year old, weighs around 48 pounds, and is a Lab/Pittie mix with a friendly, outgoing personality. He truly enjoys meeting new people and greets everyone like a potential new best friend. In his foster home, Izzy lives with an older female dog who's helping him learn the ropes and reinforcing good habits. He's already crate-trained, potty trained and knows some basic commands-he's a smart boy who's eager to keep learning! Izzy tends to do best with female dogs, as other young males can bring out his more dominant side. This energetic pup loves to play and stay active, so he'll thrive in a home that can keep up with him. If you enjoy getting outside for walks, Izzy would make a fantastic walking partner and loyal companion. If you're looking for a fun, affectionate dog who's ready to grow into an amazing lifelong friend, Izzy could be the one for you. To meet Izzy, please submit an adoption application at: https://www.mistyeyes.org/adoptionapplication
